children.heading: .—Office of Research and Development
children.label: a .—Office of Research and Development
children.text: There is in the Veterans Health Administration an Office of Research and Development (in this section referred to as the “Office”).

children.heading: .—Purposes
children.label: b .—Purposes
children.text: The function of the Office is to serve veterans through a full spectrum of research (including pre-clinical, clinical, and health systems science), technology transfer, and application.

children.heading: .—Chief Research and Development Officer
children.label: c .—Chief Research and Development Officer
children.text: The head of the Office is the Chief Research and Development Officer.

children.heading: .—Organization and Personnel
children.label: d .—Organization and Personnel
children.text: The Office shall be organized in such manner, and its personnel shall perform such duties and have such titles, as the Secretary may prescribe.
